mapper.select: select b.make_No ,a.item_cd ,dbo.getItemName(a.item_cd) as itemName ,a.proc_order_date ,a.order_qty ,(select storage_name from tb_storage_mst where storage_cd = a.storage_cd) as storage_name ,a.prod_date ,a.storage_cd ,a.memo ,a.etc ,b.po_no ,a.end_yn from TB_WORK_ORDER_PROC a inner join TB_WORK_ORDER_BATCH b on b.work_batch_id = a.work_batch_id where a.proc_cd = 'PRC005' and a.work_proc_id = #{workProcId}
